name: Spiritual Circuit
description: A journey through some of the most revered ancient temples and monasteries in the Kangra Valley.

name: Tibetan Monastic Tour
description: Explore the prominent Tibetan Buddhist monasteries established in exile across Dharamshala and Bir.

name: Hidden Forest Shrines
description: Discover secluded shrines and small temples nestled in the dense forests of the Dhauladhar foothills.
